scripts.dev:pwa: npm run build:shared && npm --workspace pwa run dev
scripts.dev:relay: npm run build:shared && npm --workspace relay run dev
scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently "npm --workspace pwa run dev" "npm --workspace relay run dev"
scripts.build: npm --workspace shared run build && npm --workspace relay run build && npm --workspace pwa run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace shared run typecheck && npm --workspace relay run typecheck && npm --workspace pwa run typecheck
